nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator

nodes.grounding_span: I would like to integrate more multimedia into my projects. Not just images, but sound and possibly light video. I see AI helping with that

nodes.grounding_span: It really saved time when got started

nodes.grounding_span: I have more ideas, and a bigger backlog of things to get started on
